meaning: n.(中世纪贵族城堡中)管家
examples: I have prayed for you, Seneschal.
No, Seneschal, you are the danger.
“Is that the extent of your challenge?” the seneschal asked.
The split in the dual role of Sark's Seneschal has come in to force.
He was deputy seneschal under Mr Guille for 13 years prior to becoming Seneschal.
